---
title:  
    "computing g score per gene"
date: 
    "Feb 25, 2026"
author:  
    "Ali Movasati"  
output:  
    html_document:
        #css: style.css
        toc: true
        toc_depth: 2
        toc_float: true
        number_sections: true
        theme: lumen
        highlight: zenburn
        code_folding: hide
        code_download: true # to make the Rmd source code available
---




```{r loading libraries, echo=FALSE}

# loading libraries
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(ggpattern)
library(plotly)
library(hrbrthemes)
library(irr)
library(dplyr)
library(zoo) # estimate na's if any 
library(tidyr)
library(Biostrings)
library(stringr)
library(magrittr)
library(rstatix)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(vegan)
library(reshape2)
library(effsize)


```



```{r read-in variant data}

# set working directory
if (file.exists("/home/amovas/")){
    print("Remote HPC Connection!")
    wd <- "/home/amovas/data/genome-evo-proj/"
} else {
    print("Local PC Connection!")
    wd <- "/Users/alimos313/Documents/studies/phd/hpc-research/genome-evo-proj/"
}

# load data
source(paste0(wd, "src/analysis/reductive-evolution/readin_data.R"))

```

```{r load visualization settings}

# load visual settings
source(paste0(wd, "src/analysis/reductive-evolution/plot_custom.R"))


```



```{r text numbers}

# set parameters
category <- "Fixed" 

if (category == "Minority"){
    min_threshold <- 0.01
    max_threshold <- 0.5
} else if (category == "Majority"){
    min_threshold <- 0.5
    max_threshold <- 1.01
} else if (category == "Fixed"){
    min_threshold <- 0.99
    max_threshold <- 1.01
}

```


```{r}



d <- variants_ann_expiii %>% filter(effect_simplified %in% c("U", "N") & passage == end_psg & allele_freq >= min_threshold) %>% select(c(exp_line, feature, mut_info)) %>% distinct() %>% group_by(exp_line, feature) %>% summarise(n = n())


filtered_data <- variants_ann_expiii %>%
    filter(effect_simplified %in% c("U", "N"),
            allele_freq >= min_threshold) %>%
    select(exp_line, feature, mut_info) %>%
    distinct()



mutation_classification <- filtered_data %>%
    group_by(feature, mut_info) %>%
    summarise(
        n_exp_lines = n_distinct(exp_line),
        .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
        mutation_type = if_else(n_exp_lines == 1, 
                                "unique", 
                                "shared")
    )

result <- mutation_classification %>%
    mutate(
        unique_count = if_else(n_exp_lines == 1, 1L, 0L),
        shared_count = if_else(n_exp_lines > 1, n_exp_lines - 1L, 0L)
    ) %>%
    group_by(feature) %>%
    summarise(
        unique = sum(unique_count),
        shared = sum(shared_count),
        .groups = "drop"
    ) %>% mutate(parallel_prop = shared / (shared + unique) %>% round(3))


result_wide <- result %>% mutate(total = unique + shared) %>%
    mutate(total_prop = total / sum(total) %>% round(3))


result_wide <- merge(result_wide, feature_df[,c("feature", "length")], by = "feature") %>% mutate(length_prop = length / sum(length) %>% round(3))

result_wide %<>% mutate(g_score = total_prop / length_prop)

result_wide %<>% filter(feature %notin% c("5R", "3R")) %<>% arrange(desc(g_score))

library(gt)
library(webshot2)
# Pipe your data to kable
# Convert your data frame to gt table
your_table <- result_wide %>%
    select(c(feature, unique, shared, total, parallel_prop, length, g_score)) %>%
    gt() %>%
    tab_header(title = "Feature Overlap Analysis") %>%
    fmt_number(columns = c("parallel_prop", "g_score"), decimals = 3) %>%
    cols_label(
        feature = "Feature",
        unique = "Unique",
        shared = "Parallel",
        total = "Total",
        parallel_prop = "Parallel Proportion",
        length = "Length",
        g_score = "G Score"
    )
    
# Save as PDF
gtsave(your_table, "/Users/alimos313/Documents/studies/phd/research/manuscripts/reductive-evolution/figures/fixed_mut_table.pdf")



```



```{r parallelism neutral randomization + heatmap}




# feature_df$region <- paste(feature_df$start, feature_df$end, sep = ":")


# overall_df <- data.frame()

# for (k in 1:nrow(feature_df)){
#     if (feature_df$feature[k] %in% c("tat1", "tat2")){
#         if (feature_df$feature[k] == "tat2") {
#             next
#         }
#         feature <- "tat"
#         feature_range <- c(feature_df$start[feature_df$feature == "tat1"]:feature_df$end[feature_df$feature == "tat1"], 
#                             feature_df$start[feature_df$feature == "tat2"]:feature_df$end[feature_df$feature == "tat2"])
#     } else if (feature_df$feature[k] %in% c("rev1", "rev2")){
#         if (feature_df$feature[k] == "rev2") {
#             next
#         }
#         feature <- "rev"
#         feature_range <- c(feature_df$start[feature_df$feature == "rev1"]:feature_df$end[feature_df$feature == "rev1"], 
#                             feature_df$start[feature_df$feature == "rev2"]:feature_df$end[feature_df$feature == "rev2"])
#     } else {
#         feature <- as.character(feature_df$feature[k])
#         feature_range <- feature_df$start[k]:feature_df$end[k]
#     }
#     effect_factor <- 1
#     print(feature)



#     # update data types
#     variants_ann_expiii$passage <- as.integer(as.character(variants_ann_expiii$passage))
#     variants_ann_expiii$feature <- as.character(variants_ann_expiii$feature)

#     # initialize an empty data frame to store results
#     df <- data.frame()

#     # loop through all pairs of experimental lines
#     for (line1 in exp_line_factor){
#         for (line2 in exp_line_factor){
#             if (str_detect(line1, "MT-2")){
#                 offset1 <- 140 # median(df$time_to_fixation[df$exp_line %in% c("MT-2_1","MT-2_2")])
#             } else {
#                 offset1 <- 185 # median(df$time_to_fixation[df$exp_line %in% c("MT-4_1","MT-4_2")])
#             }

#             if (str_detect(line2, "MT-2")){
#                 offset2 <- 140
#             } else {
#                 offset2 <- 185
#             }

#             exp_all <- data.frame()
#             for (base1 in c("A", "C", "G", "T")){
#                 for (base2 in setdiff(c("A", "C", "G", "T"), base1)){
#                     variants_expiii_sub <- variants_ann_expiii[variants_ann_expiii$ref_allele == base1 & variants_ann_expiii$alt_allele == base2 & variants_ann_expiii$genomic_pos %in% feature_range & variants_ann_expiii$mut_type == "P",]
#                     minority1 <- length(unique(variants_expiii_sub$mut_info[variants_expiii_sub$allele_freq >= 0.05 & variants_expiii_sub$exp_line %in% c(line1) & variants_expiii_sub$passage <= end_psg-offset1]))
#                     minority2 <- length(unique(variants_expiii_sub$mut_info[variants_expiii_sub$allele_freq >= 0.05 & variants_expiii_sub$exp_line %in% c(line2) & variants_expiii_sub$passage <= end_psg-offset2]))
#                     shared_minority <- length(intersect(variants_expiii_sub$mut_info[variants_expiii_sub$allele_freq >= 0.05 & variants_expiii_sub$exp_line %in% c(line1) & variants_expiii_sub$passage <= end_psg-offset1],variants_expiii_sub$mut_info[variants_expiii_sub$allele_freq >= 0.05 & variants_expiii_sub$exp_line %in% c(line2) & variants_expiii_sub$passage <= end_psg-offset2]))

#                     variants_expiii_sub2 <- variants_expiii[variants_expiii$ref_allele == base1 & variants_expiii$alt_allele == base2 & variants_expiii$feature %in% feature & variants_expiii$mut_type == "P",]
#                     fixed1 <- length(unique(variants_expiii_sub2$mut_info[variants_expiii_sub2$allele_freq >= 0.99 & variants_expiii_sub2$exp_line %in% c(line1) & variants_expiii_sub2$passage == end_psg]))
#                     fixed2 <- length(unique(variants_expiii_sub2$mut_info[variants_expiii_sub2$allele_freq >= 0.99 & variants_expiii_sub2$exp_line %in% c(line2) & variants_expiii_sub2$passage == end_psg]))
                    
                    
#                     i <- 0
                    
#                     exp_base <- integer()
#                     while (i <= 1000){
#                         i <- i + 1
#                         j <- sample(1:round(minority1*effect_factor), size = fixed1, replace = F)
#                         z <- sample(1:round(minority2*effect_factor), size = fixed2, replace = F)
#                         exp_base <- c(exp_base,sum(intersect(j,z)<=shared_minority))
#                     }

#                     exp_all <- rbind(exp_all, exp_base)
#                 }
#             }

            
#             exp_shared <- colSums(exp_all)
#             variants_expiii_sub <- variants_expiii[variants_expiii$feature %in% feature & variants_expiii$mut_type == "P",]
#             obs_all <- length(unique(variants_expiii_sub$mut_info[variants_expiii_sub$allele_freq >= 0.99 & variants_expiii_sub$exp_line %in% c(line1,line2) & variants_expiii_sub$passage == end_psg]))
#             obs_shared <- length(intersect(variants_expiii_sub$mut_info[variants_expiii_sub$allele_freq >= 0.99 & variants_expiii_sub$exp_line %in% c(line1) & variants_expiii_sub$passage == end_psg],variants_expiii_sub$mut_info[variants_expiii_sub$allele_freq >= 0.99 & variants_expiii_sub$exp_line %in% c(line2) & variants_expiii_sub$passage == end_psg]))
            
#             # Calculate mean and standard deviation
#             mean_data <- mean(exp_shared)
#             sd_data <- sd(exp_shared)
#             # Calculate the z-score
#             z_score <- (obs_shared - mean_data) / sd_data
#             # Calculate the p-value
#             if (obs_shared > mean_data){
#                 p_value <- 2 * (1 - pnorm(z_score))
#             } else {
#                 p_value <- 1
#             }
#             df <- rbind(df,c(line1,line2,obs_all,obs_shared,obs_shared/obs_all,mean_data/obs_all,p_value))
#         }
#     }

#     df %<>% set_colnames(c("Var1", "Var2", "total_unique", "shared", "%shared", "expected_%shared", "p.val"))

#     #######################
    
#     # uniqueness of fixed variants observed at the end of experiment
#     variants_expiii_sub <- variants_expiii[variants_expiii$feature %in% feature & variants_expiii$mut_type == "P",]
#     end_fixed <- variants_expiii_sub %>%
#                             filter(allele_freq >= min_threshold, allele_freq < max_threshold, passage == end_psg) %>%
#                             select(c(exp_line,mut_info)) %>%
#                             distinct()




#     # create a named vector from the df
#     muts <- end_fixed$mut_info
#     names(muts) <- end_fixed$exp_line

#     # convert named vector to list
#     muts_list <- lapply(split(muts, names(muts)), unname)

#     for (line in exp_line_factor){
#         if (!line %in% names(muts_list)){
#             muts_list[[line]] <- NA
#         }
#     }
    

#     shared_percent <- c()


#     for (i in 1:4){
#             dd <- muts_list[[i]]
#             for (j in 1:4){
#                 if (i<=j){
#                     shared_percent <- append(shared_percent,100*(sum(dd %in% muts_list[[j]])/(length(muts_list[[i]])+length(muts_list[[j]])-sum(dd %in% muts_list[[j]]))))
#                 } else {shared_percent <- append(shared_percent,NA)}
#             }
            
#     }


#     shared_mat <- matrix(shared_percent, ncol = 4)
#     row.names(shared_mat) <- exp_line_factor
#     colnames(shared_mat) <- exp_line_factor

#     shared_df <- as.data.frame(shared_mat) %>% 
#                             `colnames<-`(names(muts_list)) %>%
#                             mutate(line1 = names(muts_list)) %>%
#                             mutate(line1 = factor(line1, levels = exp_line_factor)) %>%
#                             gather(key = "line2", value = "val", 1:4) %>%
#                             mutate(line2 = factor(line2, levels = exp_line_factor)) %>%
#                             mutate(val = round(val, 2))



#     melted_cormat <- melt(shared_mat, na.rm = TRUE)

#     melted_cormat$value <- round(melted_cormat$value, digits = 1)

#     # merge simulation data
#     melted_cormat <- merge(melted_cormat, df[,c(1,2,6,7)], by = c("Var1", "Var2"))
#     melted_cormat <- melted_cormat %>%
#         mutate(p.val = as.numeric(p.val)) %>%
#         mutate(p.adj = p.adjust(p.val, method = "BH")) %>%
#         mutate(p_value_category = case_when(
#             p.adj >= 0.05 ~ "n.s.",
#             p.adj >= 0.01 & p.adj < 0.05 ~ "*",
#             p.adj >= 0.001 & p.adj < 0.01 ~ "**",
#             p.adj < 0.001 ~ "***"
#         ))

#     melted_cormat$`expected_%shared` <- round(as.numeric(melted_cormat$`expected_%shared`)*100, digits = 1)
#     melted_cormat$`expected_%shared`[melted_cormat$val == 100] <- 100
#     melted_cormat$p_value_category[melted_cormat$val == 100] <- ""

#     # generate heatmap
#     fig <- ggplot(data = as.data.frame(melted_cormat), aes(x=Var1, y=Var2, fill=value)) + 
#             geom_tile(color = "white") +
#             geom_text(aes(Var1, Var2, label = paste0(value, "(", `expected_%shared`,")\n", p_value_category)), color = "black", size = 13) +
#             labs(title = paste0("Pairwise Overlap Among ", category, " Variants \nat Passage #", end_psg)) +
#             scale_fill_gradient2(low = "white", high = "red", 
#             midpoint = 1, limit = c(0,100), space = "Lab", 
#             name="Parallel (%)") +
#             custom_plot_theme() +
#             theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
#                     axis.title.y = element_blank())+
#             coord_fixed()



#     # save figure
#     custom_plot_save(fig, paste0("parallel_heatmap_", feature,".pdf"), height = 14, width = 14)
    
#     #######################

#     obs <- melted_cormat$value[melted_cormat$value != 100]
#     mean_obs <- mean(obs)
#     se_obs <- sd(obs)/sqrt(length(obs))
#     exp <- melted_cormat$`expected_%shared`[melted_cormat$value != 100]
#     mean_exp <- mean(exp)
#     se_exp <- sd(exp)/sqrt(length(exp))

#     wilcox_res <- wilcox.test(obs, exp)


#     cohen_d <- cohen.d(obs, exp)
#     ratio <- mean(obs)/ mean(exp)


#     p_val <- wilcox_res$p.value

#     overall_df <- rbind(overall_df, c(feature, "Observed", mean_obs, se_obs, p_val, cohen_d$estimate, ratio))
#     overall_df <- rbind(overall_df, c(feature, "Simulated", mean_exp, se_exp, p_val, cohen_d$estimate, ratio))

# }

# colnames(overall_df) <- c("Translation_impact", "group", "mean", "se", "p.val", "cohen_d", "ratio")


# overall_df %<>% mutate_at(1, as.factor)
# overall_df$group <- factor(overall_df$group, levels = c("Observed", "Simulated"))
# overall_df %<>% mutate_at(3:7, as.numeric)
# overall_df$adj.p.val <- p.adjust(overall_df$p.val, method = "BH")

# saveRDS(overall_df, file = paste0(wd, "results/tables/parallel_randomized_per_genomic_region.rds"))

overall_df <- readRDS(file = paste0(wd, "results/tables/parallel_randomized_per_genomic_region.rds"))

```



```{r parallel translational impact barplot summary}


overall_df_sub <- overall_df %>%
    filter(Translation_impact %notin% c("5R", "3R")) %>%
    group_by(Translation_impact) %>%
    mutate(
        ratio = mean[group == "Observed"] /
                mean[group == "Simulated"]
    ) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    arrange(desc(cohen_d)) %>%
    mutate(Translation_impact = factor(Translation_impact, levels = unique(Translation_impact)))


# generate barplot
fig <- ggplot(overall_df_sub, 
            aes(x = Translation_impact, y = mean, pattern = group)) +
    geom_col_pattern(
        position = position_dodge(width = 0.9),
        color = "black",
        fill = "white",
        pattern_fill = "black",
        pattern_density = 0.3,
        pattern_spacing = 0.03,
        pattern_key_scale_factor = 0.6,
        width = 0.8
    ) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean - se, ymax = mean + se),
        position = position_dodge(width = 0.9),
        width = 0.3, color = "black", size = 1.5) +
    labs(
        title = paste0("Summary of Parallelism at Transfer #", end_psg),
        y = "Parallel (%)",
        x = "\nTranslational impact"
    ) +
    scale_x_discrete(
        labels = c("All" = "All", "Syn" = "Synonymous", "Non_Syn" = "Nonsynonymous")
    ) +
    scale_pattern_manual(
        name = "Dataset",
        values = c("Observed" = "stripe", "Randomized" = "circle"),
        labels = c("Observed", "Randomized")
    ) +
    scale_pattern_fill_manual(
        values = c("Observed" = "black", "Randomized" = "black"),
        guide = "none"
    ) +
    guides(
        fill = "none",
        pattern = guide_legend(
        override.aes = list(
            pattern_fill = "black",
            fill = "white",
            color = "black"
        )
        )
    ) +
    geom_text(
        data = overall_df_sub %>% filter(group == "Observed"),
        aes(y= mean + se + 2, label = ifelse(p.val < 0.001, "***", ifelse(p.val < 0.01, "**", ifelse(p.val < 0.05, "*", "n.s.")))),
        position = position_dodge(width = 0.9),
        size = 10
    ) +
    custom_plot_theme(application = "publication") +
    theme(
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        axis.title.x = element_blank()
    )

# save figure
custom_plot_save(fig, "parallel_summary_barplot_translational_impact.pdf", height = 14, width = 14)
```
